Home / CRM & Sales / EspoCRM

EspoCRM — open source alternative

Fast, lightweight open source CRM.

Strengths

  • Snappy UI and modern feel.
  • Workflow and reporting included in community edition.
  • Docker deploy works well.

Weaknesses

  • Smaller extension ecosystem than SuiteCRM.
  • Some advanced modules are paid extensions.
  • Smaller partner network.
License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 2/5 Hosted cloud optionMobile: iOS, Android

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

EspoCRM is used as an alternative to

HubSpot CRM

Marketing, sales, and service in one platform.

See all alternatives →

Salesforce

Enterprise CRM and customer platform.

See all alternatives →

Pipedrive

Sales pipeline CRM for small and mid-market teams.

See all alternatives →
